zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Welby IV於1355年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾莫爾頓時，他的父親Sir Richard de Welby15歲，母親Beatrice Mayson20歲。他於1385年與Margaret De Welby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Welby IV于1355年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾莫爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Welby15岁，母亲Beatrice Mayson20岁。他于1385年与Margaret De Welby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Welby, one in Leicestershire and one in Lincolnshire. The Lincolnshire placename derives from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’. The Leicestershire placename is recorded as Alebi in 1086 and Welby in 1518, and derives from the Old Norse personal name Áli + Old Norse bý. The name is established in Ireland (Galway).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Welby IV was born in 1355, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard de Welby, was 15 and his mother, Beatrice Mayson, was 20. He married Margaret De Welby in 1385, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1410, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Welby IV est né en 1355, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard de Welby, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Mayson, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Welby en 1385, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1410, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Welby IV 1355 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Welby 15 und seine Mutter Beatrice Mayson 20. Er hat 1385 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret De Welby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Welby IV è nato il nel 1355 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard de Welby, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Mayson, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Welby nel 1385, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1410, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Welby IVが1355年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Welbyは15歳，母Beatrice Maysonは20歳であった。1385年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMargaret De Welbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Welby IV(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Welby(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Mayson(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Margaret De Welby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Welby IV nasceu em 1355, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard de Welby, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Mayson, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Welby em 1385, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1410, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Welby IV родился в 1355 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Welby было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Mayson, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Welby в 1385 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1410 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Welby IV nació en 1355, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard de Welby, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Beatrice Mayson, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret De Welby en 1385, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1410, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
